Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

## 🎨 UX & Accessibility Checklist
- [ ] Changes follow existing design patterns
- [ ] Interaction feels smooth and responsive
- [ ] Semantic HTML is used correctly
- [ ] Keyboard navigation is supported (tab order, focus states)
- [ ] ARIA labels are added to icon-only buttons
- [ ] Color contrast meets accessibility standards
- [ ] Alt text is provided for informative images
